goals: Calculate future value of personal savings to understand investment growth potential
Compare future values across multiple interest rates and time periods to evaluate different investment scenarios
Calculate present value of a future amount to understand current worth of planned finances
Explore discount pricing for book or content sales to determine appropriate pricing strategies

user_agent_config.personality: Intellectually curious and culturally grounded. Prefers clear explanations and practical applications over technical jargon. Values understanding over speed.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Comfortable with basic math concepts but not familiar with financial formulas or tool names. Knows how to use a calculator but would benefit from guidance on which calculations to use for different situations.

end_condition: The user has explored at least one investment projection and one pricing/discount calculation, gaining practical financial insights for personal planning or creative work monetization.
